author: Ciprian-Florin Ifrim
name: 74.3M Ternary U-Net - v2 - BitNet b1.58 + BF16 Scales + EMBED_DIM=312 + NeoMuon + 4x relu2 MLP + FP8 QAT + Base-3 LZMA
blurb: 10L 768d ternary U-Net transformer with relu2 4x MLP, factored tied embedding (312-dim), BF16 scale storage, FP8 QAT, poly5 softcap, YaRN 2048, NeoMuon optimizer (3 Newton-Schulz steps), base-3+LZMA compression. Continuation of #640 with tighter roundtrip (0.0011 vs 0.0021) and richer embeddings. Sliding eval stride=16 T=0.90. 3-seed mean 1.1539 bpb (std 0.0004).
